name: moody
short_effect: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
effect_text: After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage.  If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.
flavor_text: Every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted sharply but another stat will be lowered.
